message:
update(beads): close debounced pipeline and diagnostics beads, start layout lab

Close bd-2u0.5.4.2 (debounced latest-edit-wins render pipeline with
stale-run suppression and stage timing surfacing) and bd-2u0.5.4.3
(inline diagnostics, remediation hints, and preserved fallback preview
for degraded playground states). Advance bd-2u0.5.5.1 (layout and
cycle-strategy lab) to in_progress.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -167,7 +167,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-2u0.5.4.2","title":"Implement debounced+cancellable parse→layout→render pipeline","description":"## Objective
Connect editor changes to rendering with robust control flow.

## Subtasks
- Implement debounced update scheduling.
- Cancel stale parse/layout/render jobs when newer edits arrive.
- Surface stage-level timing and error boundaries.

## Evidence
No stale-render race conditions; latest edit always wins deterministically.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","notes":"Reworked the standalone playground render loop in frankenmermaid_demo_showcase.html into a debounced latest-edit-wins pipeline. Added revisioned scheduling, superseded-job resolution, snapshot-based mermaid/franken render collection, offscreen canvas rendering to prevent stale direct canvas commits, and stage timing surfaced through parseSummary/chip titles. Updated evidence/demo_strategy.md to record latest-edit-wins and visible stage timing/error expectations for the playground.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:24.556585258Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-27T17:35:14.646719457Z","closed_at":"2026-03-27T17:35:14.646424478Z","close_reason":"Completed debounced latest-edit-wins render pipeline with stale-run suppression and stage timing surfacing","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo","performance","pipeline"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T05:54:22.484588462Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:24.556585258Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.4.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:27.867166173Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2u0.5.4.3","title":"Implement inline diagnostics, remediation hints, and safe fallback preview","description":"## Objective
Ensure users understand and recover from issues quickly.

## Subtasks
- Map diagnostics to inline markers and a structured diagnostics panel.
- Provide remediation hints and confidence context.
- Provide graceful fallback preview for unrecoverable states.

## Evidence
Error scenarios remain navigable with actionable user guidance.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","notes":"Extended the standalone playground with diagnostics-first recovery affordances in frankenmermaid_demo_showcase.html: added structured diagnostics and fallback preview cards, line-linked gutter markers, remediation/confidence hints derived from detect/parse/render results, and preserved last-healthy preview behavior when the current revision degrades. Updated evidence/demo_strategy.md to record diagnostics-first, line-linked recovery, and safe fallback preview as part of the playground contract.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:24.657477704Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-27T18:03:49.942103865Z","closed_at":"2026-03-27T18:03:49.941831289Z","close_reason":"Completed inline diagnostics, remediation hints, and preserved fallback preview for degraded playground states","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo","diagnostics","recovery"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.4.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:28.157010471Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.4.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:24.657477704Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.4.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.4.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:28.057274380Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2u0.5.5","title":"Implement feature spotlight modules for core differentiators","description":"## Why this exists
The demo must explicitly spotlight differentiators instead of hoping users discover them. This track packages capabilities into guided, testable modules.

## Scope
- Layout/cycle strategy explorer.
- Theme/style studio.
- Export artifact studio.
- Feature-complete gallery/compare mode.

## Deliverables
- Distinct showcase modules with clear educational framing.
- Module-level controls and validation artifacts.
- Unified module navigation and state interoperability.

## Acceptance Evidence
A reviewer can verify each major capability by running named showcase modules end-to-end.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:24.755713848Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T05:54:19.138166493Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo","features","showcase"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.5","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:24.755713848Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.5","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:26.632971710Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":115,"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.5","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Dependency rationale: this track exists as an execution lane with explicit upstream blockers and concrete downstream evidence obligations so contributors can act without consulting external planning docs.","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:30Z"}]}
-{"id":"bd-2u0.5.5.1","title":"Build layout and cycle-strategy lab with comparative visual controls","description":"## Objective
Show layout intelligence visibly.

## Subtasks
- Expose algorithm and cycle strategy controls.
- Visualize effects on crossings, edge routing, and graph legibility.
- Surface relevant layout stats for each run.

## Evidence
Users can compare layout strategies on the same input and inspect outcome metrics.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:24.854292474Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T05:54:18.986458605Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo","layout","showcase"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.5.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.4.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:28.248939801Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.5.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:24.854292474Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"bd-2u0.5.5.2","title":"Build theme/style studio with preset and parameterized controls","description":"## Objective
Show visual customization depth and quality.

## Subtasks
- Expose preset themes and key style knobs.
- Provide before/after comparisons with reset semantics.
- Persist style state in shareable links.

## Evidence
Theme changes are reproducible and visibly coherent across scenario families.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:24.952618155Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T05:54:18.835474732Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo","showcase","theme"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.5.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.4.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:28.344319869Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.5.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:24.952618155Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2u0.5.5.3","title":"Build export/artifact lab (SVG, PNG, IR, config/state)","description":"## Objective
Demonstrate production-ready outputs and interoperability.

## Subtasks
- Export SVG, PNG, parser IR, and effective config/state.
- Add artifact metadata for reproducibility (timestamps, hash/size where applicable).
- Validate exported outputs for basic integrity constraints.

## Evidence
Artifacts are downloadable, valid, and traceable to demo state.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:25.049858506Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T05:54:18.683949887Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo","export","showcase"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.5.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.4.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:28.436018677Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.5.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:25.049858506Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2u0.5.5.4","title":"Build full-capability gallery and compare mode with guided callouts","description":"## Objective
Guarantee complete capability discoverability in the UI.

## Subtasks
- Create scenario gallery covering all major diagram families and capability tags.
- Add compare mode to juxtapose scenarios/settings/renderers.
- Add guided callouts that explain capability significance.

## Evidence
Gallery coverage report confirms no major feature family is missing from showcase navigation.

## Verification, Test, and Logging Requirements (Mandatory)
- Unit tests: add or update focused unit tests for every function/module touched by this bead, including edge cases and error paths.
- Integration tests: add or update integration coverage for cross-module behavior and any contract boundaries changed by this bead.
- End-to-end scripts: add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise this bead's user-visible behavior on relevant surfaces (`/web`, `/web_react`, CLI/WASM where applicable).
- Structured logging: emit and validate machine-readable logs for test runs with at least: `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `surface`, `renderer`, `theme`, `config_hash`, `parse_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `degradation_tier`, `output_artifact_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Determinism checks: run repeat executions for representative scenarios and assert stable outputs/log summaries when determinism is expected.
- Evidence artifacts: store test/log artifacts so they are reviewable and reproducible; failures must include actionable context and suggested remediation.
- Planning/research-only beads: even when no runtime code changes, add validation scripts/checklists that verify artifact completeness, schema consistency, and decision-trace logging.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:25.149478851Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T05:54:18.530287780Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo","gallery","showcase"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.5.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:28.811648505Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.5.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:25.149478851Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.5.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:28.529005095Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.5.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.5.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:28.623553246Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2u0.5.5.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2u0.5.5.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T04:34:28.717849847Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
